properties.query: INSERT INTO courses (course_id, course_title, description, is_public, is_deleted) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, false)
SELECT course_id, course_title, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_public, is_deleted FROM courses WHERE course_id = ?
SELECT course_id, course_title, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_public, is_deleted FROM courses WHERE is_deleted = false ORDER BY course_id ASC
UPDATE courses SET course_title = ?, description = ?, is_public = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE course_id = ? AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE courses SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE course_id = ? AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE courses SET is_public = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE course_id = ? AND is_deleted = false
